---
title: "Areas Covered"
description: "Case management and rehabilitation coordination across Northern Ireland."
---

# Areas Covered

Case Management NI provides support across Northern Ireland, subject to referral needs and availability.

## Areas May Include

::: {.service-card}
### Greater Belfast

Belfast, Lisburn, Newtownabbey, Bangor, and surrounding areas.
:::

::: {.service-card}
### County Down and County Antrim

Community-based support across towns and rural areas.
:::

::: {.service-card}
### Wider Northern Ireland

Enquiries from other areas are welcome and considered individually.
:::

[Make an Enquiry](contact.qmd){.button-link}
